_doc: Items quarantined from the MERCH book (positions.json / watch / screen) — farming inputs, loot, personal-use consumables. Their events STAY in fills.json (full audit); this only filters the derived merch views. A transaction on an ignored item is shown as a real flip ONLY if it matches a `greenlisted` entry (id + price within ±3% + ts within ±6h) — the agent appends one when Ben confirms a recommended flip of an ignored item. See pipeline/lib/ignored.mjs + FILLS-PIPELINE.md.
